Everything 1.3.4.686: Update the search results each time the search parameters change.
Everything 1.4.1.870: When enabled the search results are updated each time the search parameters change otherwise the search is only updated when pressing Enter in the search box.

Everything 1.4.1.870: Are you sure you wish to delete all search history?nnThis action can not be undone.

Everything 1.3.4.686: Display a list of suggested searches when typing in a search.
Everything 1.4.1.870: Display a list of suggested searches when typing in a search\nSearch suggestions are always shown if search as you type is disabled\nYou can also show search suggestions with Auto Complete Search (Ctrl+Space).

Everything 1.3.4.686: Treat forward slashes (/) as back slashes (\).
Everything 1.4.1.870: Forward slashes (/) are replaced with backslashes (\).

Everything 1.3.4.686: Install or uninstall the Everything service.
Everything 1.4.1.870: Install or uninstall the "Everything" service\nThe Everything service is required to index NTFS volumes with a standard user account\nEnabling the service will allow ALL local user accounts to index all filenames on NTFS volumes.

Everything 1.3.4.686:
The command for this context menu item
$exec(application parameters) execute application with parameters
$parent(filename) returns the parent folder of the specified file or folder
$pathpart(filename) returns the parent folder of the specified file or folder
$namepart(filename) returns the name part of the specified file or folder
%1 = selected filename
$$ = $n$( = (n$) = )
Everything 1.4.1.870:
The command for this context menu item
$exec(application parameters) execute application with parameters
$openpath(filename) open the folder containing filename and select filename
$parent(filename) returns the parent folder of the specified file or folder
$pathpart(filename) returns the parent folder of the specified file or folder
$namepart(filename) returns the name part of the specified file or folder
%1 = selected filename
$$ = $n$( = (n$) = )
